_comment: Authoritative placeholder glossary for the agentic-seed template. Every {{PLACEHOLDER}} that appears in a tracked file MUST be declared here. project-bootstrap fill-mode reads this to prompt for values and substitute them. 'example' is the violin-tools instance this seed was extracted from (illustrative, not a default).

PROJECT_TAGLINE.example: a web app of focused practice tools for violinists

LOCAL_FOLDER.description: Local clone folder name (may differ from REPO)

CODEOWNER.description: GitHub handle of the sole code owner (no @)

REVIEW_BOT.description: OPTIONAL: machine-user GitHub handle for the bot reviewer (no @). Blank disables the review-bot module.

FIGMA_FILE_ID.description: OPTIONAL: Figma file key for the design system. Blank disables the Figma module.

meta._comment: Documentation meta-tokens that describe the placeholder mechanism itself (in prose/backticks). They are NOT instance values: fill-template.sh must NOT substitute them, and they legitimately survive into a filled instance. validate-scaffolding.sh's template-integrity check treats them as DECLARED so they never read as undeclared tokens.
